about: AJ Shepard is a licensed property manager in the state of Oregon and also a licensed Contractor in Oregon. His experience in real estate starts more than 10 years ago in the contracting business. Finding his passion in real estate and construction management has created an avenue for Uptown Properties to help provide all services necessary to its clients. Knowing the trade and the ability to manage many allows for streamlined maintenance for the investors property at a reduced cost.

about: Brian A. Birdy served for 15 years in the United State Air Force before starting in Property Management. In 2000 he earned his Texas Real Estate License and went to work in the family business at Birdy Properties, LLC, CRMC.  In 2004 he received his Texas Real Estate Brokers License and bought the company from his father.  Birdy Properties is a Real Estate Company that has specialized in Property Management for over 36 years.  Brian has taken the company from a one-man office with 75 doors to a business of 20 employees that manages over 1100 properties and collects over 20 million dollars in rent each year.  Brian has received his Residential Management Professional (RMP) and Master Property Manager (MPM) designations from NARPM, and the Certified Property Manager (CPM) designation from IREM.  He is an approved Property Management Instructor for both the State of Texas and NARPM.  Brian is currently serving on the NARPM Board of Directors as the National Treaurer.

about:
I have been involved in property management since 1992. Since then I have been a full time property manager, a property management consultant and a rental owner. In 2005 I had the opportunity to start Details Property Management. We focus on managing single family and small, multi-unit complexes in the Kitsap County area of Washington. We are happy to say that the majority of our clients come from referrals and we continue to strive to live up to the "Details" name. In 2016 we received the prestigious Certified Residential Management Company (CRMC) designation.

I have been involved in the NARPM Governmental Affairs Committee and have served as the chair for 2013 and 2014. I am also involved in our local and state legislative efforts. I have served 2 terms as Kitsap County Chapter president.

about:
Mike and Sandy Collins own Green River Property Management which specializes in the Jacksonville area of Northeast Florida. Our company has achieved "Certified Residential Management Company" status as of November 2019. The "CRMC" designation is the highest level of property management excellence and we are now the only CRMC company in Northeast Florida, and the 63rd company in the U.S. ever to achieve this level.
We rent and manage residential housing, and investment properties. We also have a sales team. Our NextHome Collins Realty staff assists investors in the purchase and sale of residential properties, and Green River Property Managment manages hundreds of those properties. We currently work with National, Regional, and Local investors.
Mike Collins, a licensed Real Estate Broker and Realtor, is a member of the 10,000 member Northeast Florida Associations serving as the current Property Manager of The Year. Mike is also a Past President of the NARPM Florida State Chapter, the organization's largest chapter, and was President in 2016. He is a also Past President (2013) of the NARPM Northeast Florida chapter. He will share his expertise with anyone interested in Real Estate Investment in rentals, vacation homes, multi-family homes, etc.
Mike's expertise is well known in the Jacksonville area where he was a National and Local Sales Award recipient.

904-807-8331
mike@GreenRiverPM.com
www.greenriverpm.com

about:
Kit received his Bachelor of Arts degree from the University of Utah in 1982. As a native of the Southeast, he returned to the area upon graduation and began work in a family real estate development company in North Carolina. In 1986, he founded IPM Corp. with two partners in an effort to provide professional management services to the partner's residential properties. Soon after the company was founded, a market niche was identified for residential management services and the company began offering fee management for third party owners. IPM specializes in single-family homes and homeowners associations. Current management portfolio includes high end residential rentals and some of the nations most prestigious community associations.

Kit is Past President of the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM). He is one of fewer than 300 individuals nationally to have been designated a Master Property Manager. He also holds the Certified Property Manager designation through the Institute of Real Estate Management (IREM). Garren is on the faculty of the National Association of Residential Property Managers, and teaches property management courses throughout the nation.
Kit was a founding director of the Home Management Network and served on its national board. He is active in the Institute of Real Estate Management as a member of the Western North Carolina Chapter and is a full member of Urban Land Institute. Kit also remains involved in the local community. He has served as member and Chairman of the Transylvania County Planning Board, as Vice President of Transylvania County Homebuilders Association, as President of the Asheville Area Apartment Association, and as a current member of Henderson County Board of Realtors. Kit has

about:
Vickie Gaskill began her career in professional property management almost 40 years ago. Beginning in 1980, she worked as a vendor that serviced the property management industry. Vickie came to work for Bell-Anderson and Associates, LLC, in May of 1986. At Bell-Anderson she was a bookkeeper then a property manager and now is the owner. In September of 2002, along with her husband, Tim, she purchased Bell-Anderson and Assoc., LLC, AMO, CRMC. Along with her daughter, Carrie, Vickie also owns Willow Properties in Tacoma, Wa.

Vickie has managed single-family dwellings, community associations, small multi-family communities and a few small commercial properties. She has earned four professional property management designations (MPM, RMP, CPM, and ARM) and is a member of the local Board of Realtors. Vickie is also an instructor for the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM) and serves on the National Faculty for the Institute of Real Estate Management (IREM). Having been a member since 1994, Vickie served as NARPM's national president in 2010.

Vickie has written numerous articles and seminars about professional property management issues and personal enrichment. Vickie co-authored the book; Community Associations: A Guide to Successful Management, published by IREM in 2008. She was responsible for its rewrite in 2018. Vickie was inducted into IREM's Academy of Authors in 2008.

On a personal basis, Vickie has two daughters, Dawn Hardley and Carrie Snyder, MPM, RMP. She loves to spoil her 4 grandchildren as much as possible. Most recently Vickie has taken up fly fishing. She's not quite ready yet to tell people she knows what she's doing. But give it time...

Steve received his RMP designation in 1998, MPM in 2001 and his company earned the CRMC designation in 2008. Steve served on NARPM's national board from 2008 to 2015 and was NARPMs 2014 President. Steve sold Boardwalk in 2018 and moved to Lakeway, TX.

about:
Thanks to all of his NARPM Colleagues, Tony A Drost, MPM, RMP states life is good. Tony started First Rate Property Management, Inc (FRPM) in 1995 and manages about 750 units and employs 10 people. Tony is NARPMs Region 4 Vice President and calls Boise, Idaho his home. Tony has a BA Degree in Operations Management, which gave him the tools to be an effective manager. However, Tony credits his involvement with NARPM for the real financial success and streamlining of his company.

Over the years, Tony has applied what he has learned from NARPM and its members and has delegated the day-to-day operations to staff members. Tony focuses on strategic planning for the company and is constantly seeking out new ways to do things more efficiently and better. Tony offers a class titled, Get a Life, which teaches how to increase your income, hire more staff, delegate duties, and how to plan. Tony learns something new at every NARPM event and looks forward to networking you at the next NARPM event.

about:
Kathleen has been a licensed Realtor since 1979.  With more than 20 years of experience in real estate as both a sales agent and property manager, she has spent the last decade leading as Director of Property Management for a major firm in Tampa Bay Co. In this role, she managed a portfolio of over 1,200 units spanning five counties, developed and taught comprehensive management skills to fellow agents, and prioritized exceptional customer care through ongoing educational initiatives. Now in her new role as portfolio manager for the properties she manages with her husband and she utilizes her marketing and experience to grow their portfolio.  She is excited to leverage this extensive industry background and passion as she steps into the role of Chapter President.

 When not working, Kathleen enjoys early morning runs, drawing, reading and spending time with her family!

about:
Arrico is a family owned and operated Real Estate and Property Management Company. Paul Arringtons Realtor and Mortgage experience began after culminating a successful 20-year career with the United States Air Force. During that time we made eight cross-country moves - we have first hand knowledge of what our customers are going through. We try to make the process as stress-free as possible.

Paul holds both Florida Real Estate Broker and Florida Mortgage Broker licenses. Prior to starting Arrico Realty and Property Management Paul worked as a Realtor and Mortgage Broker with Total Home Source, Inc., Keller Williams Realty, Premier Mortgage, and Florida Mortgage Funding where he closed millions of dollars in real estate transactions.

Stacey Arrington worked as a Property Manager Assistant for Birdy Properties, one of the largest and most successful residential property management companies in San Antonio, TX. She was responsible for customer service, maintenance coordination, and account documentation. Her experience is crucial in the success of our company.

We're members of the Greater Tampa Association of Realtors (GTAR) and the Multiple Listing Service (MLS). Additional affiliations Include: National Association of Realtors, Florida Association of Realtors, , National Association of Residential Property Managers, Realtor Ambassador to Macdill AFB, FL, Military Relocation Association, Realtor's Information Network, and we host a Web page on the Internet at www.arricorealty.com.

We manage property the old fashioned way; and although it may sound a little corny, we actually take care of your home like it was ours!

Rick served on the NARPM Education Committee for 10 years, and has chaired the NARPM Grievance Committee. Rick has served as Grievance Chairman for the Leasing & Management Division of the Austin Board of REALTORS and has served on that boards Professional Standards Committee for several years.

Rick is a past recipient of the Member of the Year award, the highest honor of the Leasing Management Division of the Austin Board of REALTORs, and is a co-recipient of the 2007 NARPM Presidents Award.

about: Licensed since 2003 Rob and his wife Renee opened MileStone Real Estate Services in 2007.  MileStone Real Estate Services currently manages over 470 units primarily single-family homes.   Rob has over 30 years of residential property management experience.  Rob has taught classes at Local, State, Regional, and National NARPM Conferences.  He is a past president of the Colorado Springs Chapter of NARPM and currently serves by helping with the annual Landlord Symposium which he was a integral part of creating in 2006.  Since 2012 he has served on the Colorado Real Estate Education Task Force helping create the required Annual Update Course all Colorado Licensee's are required to take.  In 2013 he also  served on the Colorado Real Estate Commission Property Management Task Force.  Rob is certified by the state to teach the Colorado Annual Update Course,  is the only person teaching a class on commission position 27 that deals directly with Property Management, along with classes on Security Deposits, Leases, Management Agreements, Fair Housing, 3 Way Reconciliation, Ethics, Sales Contracts and other real estate and property management related classes.  Rob has consistently been in the top 10% of residential sales transactions.  Rob was the 2006 and 2021 President for the Colorado Springs Chapter of NARPM.  He currently serves as the Education Chair.

about: My name is Marc Witmer, REALTOR, and I joined the ALPS staff in 2007. I earned a B.A. in Jazz Composition as well as a M.M. in Jazz Theory from the University of Texas in Austin. Before entering the real estate world in 2004, I had over 20 years of various management experience in retail sales, software operations and development, local government division head, as well as full time ministry as a worship director. Attention to details as well as compassion in dealing personally with clients brings a unique strength for property management. By persistently pursuing a Win-Win outcome for owners and tenants, a proven track record of success as a property manager has been created that builds on relationships with property owners. I have been married to my one and only wife, Carole, since 1983 and now take pleasure in the joy of our grandson and granddaughter being an integral part of our lives.

about: Since joining the ALPS team in 2009, I have worked my way up from Receptionist to Property Manager. After attending Texas Realtors University, I obtained my real estate license and became a REALTOR in 2011. I then earned my Graduate Realtor Institute (GRI) designation from the Texas Association of Realtors in 2013. I now manage a portfolio of about 150 properties for ALPS. Through the Texas Association of Realtors, I am certified as a Texas Residential Leasing Specialist, Texas Residential Property Manager, and have graduated from the Texas Realtors Leadership Program. I have also been a member of the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM) since 2012 and have served on its Austin Chapter Board of Directors since 2014 in the capacity of Education Chair, Marketing Chair, and Secretary and President. I earned NARPMs highest designation of Master Property Manager which requires hundreds of hours of education and service in the property management industry and at least 500 unit years of experience. My goal is to always provide exceptional care to my owner clients and customers through education, experience, and by working closely with our team at ALPS to ensure professional management and outstanding customer service.

about:
Angela McKee is no stranger to property management. With a background full of working with HVAC company professionals, construction workers and master electricians, she became all too familiar with the many details of properties and how to manage them at an early age.

Angela has always had a soft spot for others and began volunteering at City Rescue Mission in 2006. Her desire was to offer compassion and hope for those broken by addiction, wanting help to rebuild their lives.

Desiring to blend a love for people with her own natural, professional abilities, Angela launched a property maintenance company in 2010. She then went on to earn her real estate license shortly thereafter. Angela proved herself invaluable as she advanced to property manager while simultaneously rehabbing multiple houses and flipping myriads of rental properties. In addition, she commissioned various work crews while overseeing arduous rehab construction projects, gaining extensive experience working with both local and foreign owners/investors.

about:
With experience in property management and real estate spanning a decade, Gamze has built a career rooted in efficiency, problem-solving, and exceptional service. Born in Turkey and raised in Germany, Gamze graduated from Sabel Wirtschaftsschule, a vocational business school, where she developed a strong foundation in business administration and finance. She later moved to Texas in 2012, where she purchased her first investment propertyan experience that ignited her passion for real estate. Since then, she has worked extensively in property management, gaining hands-on experience in leasing, asset management, and investment strategies.

Gamze is a licensed Realtor with the Austin Board of Realtors and holds the Commitment to Excellence designation, reflecting her dedication to industry best practices and ongoing professional growth. She recently relocated from El Paso, where she was actively involved in the local real estate community and served as the Vice Chair for the Equal Opportunity and Diversity Committee, advocating for fair housing and inclusivity in real estate. Here in Austin, Gamze serves on the Board for the Austin Chapter of the National Association of Residential Property Managers, continuing Rollingwood's committment to this outstanding organization that helps better the quality of all residential investment managers. In 2026 Gamze was awarded the Texas Residential Leasing Specialist Certification.

Beyond her professional life, Gamze is a proud mother of two daughters, who are her greatest joy and motivation. She loves sharing new experiences with them, whether through travel, cultural exploration, or simply enjoying everyday moments together. about:
After purchasing investment real estate in Manatee County in the late 90s and recognizing the dearth of management options, Andy founded Gulf Coast Property Management in 2003. Starting out with just one property owner, Andy has driven the growth of the company and firmly established Gulf Coast Property Management as one of the premier property firms in the region. Originally from the UK, where he served 14 years as a police officer, Andy has relished every step of his entrepreneurial journey.

Always seeking new and innovative ways to improve the rental ownership experience for property owners, Andy is encouraged by the improvements made in the property management industry. He believes that the advent of new technology is at the cornerstone of the industry's growth. He strives to incorporate this technology at the very heart of Gulf Coast Property Management, while continuing his commitment to providing professional, trustworthy service. Andy holds key positions within organizations such as NARPM and VRMA, allowing him to help shape the future of this growing industry.

True to his roots, Andy still harbors a passion for all sports, especially rugby and golf. He lives locally with his wife Jenny and their young son Warwick.

Fun Fact: Andy is bilingual He speaks English and American.

Bob is Senior Advisor and owner at HomeRiver Property Management, formerly HomePointe Property Management located in Sacamento, CA. The company specializes in residential properties ranging from houses,condos, duplexes, apartment, and smaller commercial properties. HomeRiver has offices in 22 markets nationwide and is the largest single family property management company in the US.

The company has a full service maintenance division and holds a General Contractors License, Plumbing License,and HVAC License working as HomeRiver Property Services.

Bob is a past national president of NARPM (1996-97) and has held numerous board positions and is a national speaker, Bob founded the Annual Past President's National Charity that has raised over a half million dollars since 2010 for various charities.

Bob's partner in life is Debijean Machado. Bob and DJ have 3 grown children, including Alexandra Goldthwaite, CPM, who works in the firm. He also has four grandchildren and all reside in the Sacramento area.

Andrew Propst has over 15 years of experience both in residential and commercial real estate management. Currently Andy is the CEO ofHome River Group (the parent company of Park Place Property Management) and a Business Developer for Park Place, a Certified Residential Management Company (CRMC), in Boise, Idaho. Andrew has illustrated throughout his career his resolute commitment to delivering first-class results for clients, as well as consistently improving efficiencies and operations across his companies. Industry knowledge and a keen focus on technology has been a major priority for Andy. He has obtained three of the leading industry designations: Certified Property Manager (CPM) from the Institute of Real Estate Management (IREM), Master Property Manager (MPM) and Residential Management Professional (RMP), both from the National Association of Residential Property Managers NARPM. Andy is currently a Candidate for the designation of Certified Commercial Investment Member (CCIM) from the CCIM Institute. His goal is to complete this designation by the end of 2016.

Volunteerism has been a major focus and joy for Andy, from service on the National Board of Directors of NARPM for six years as a Regional Vice President, to National Treasurer, National President-Elect, and then his election as President of The National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM) in 2015. Currently, Andy serves as immediate Past President for NARPM and continues to offer ongoing counsel and insight to the Board of Directors of NARPM, using his extensive knowledge and experience within the industry. Andy has also had the privilege of serving on other local and national real estate boards.

Andy a

James Emory Tungsvik, MPM RMP joined Around The Clock, Inc. CRMC Team in 1994. James is the President and Chief Executive Officer specializing in single-family and community association management. In 1998, he earned the Residential Management Professional (RMP), and in 2003, he earned the Master Property Manager (MPM) Designations through the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM). He is an active member and volunteer of NARPM. He has served on their National Board of Directors from 2007 through 2014 as a Regional Vice President, Treasurer, National President, and National Past President. In addition, he currently sits on the National Certification, Auditors, and Conference Committees. He has served on the King County Chapter as Secretary, Treasurer, and member of their Welcoming and Vendor Affiliate Committees. He has been the NARPM Washington State Chapter Treasurer and served on the national Regional Conferences and Leadership Training Committees. From 2005 to current, he Co-Chaired the NW Regional Conferences. James is a native Washingtonian growing up in the Greater Seattle area. His previous background is in banking, working for Rainier National Bank, Security Pacific Bank, Pacific First Federal Savings and Loan, and Washington Mutual, specializing in the development and implementation of volunteer programs for employees to partner with local non-profit groups in their service areas per the Federal Community Re-Investment Act Guidelines of 1977. Contact him at James@aroundtheclockinc.com.

Michael McVety brings a diverse background and expertise to Realty Services. Having 6 years military experience and having worked as a school administrator for 2 years, he has helped with the direction of Realty Services for the last 25 years.

Michael has served on many Real Estate Property Management boards as well as multi-family boards to help promote professionalism in the industry as well as discuss issues with today's top leaders. He has served as:


President for the Lee and Collier County/ Southwest Chapter for the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM). He served as President in 2000-4 and from 2013-2018.
State President for the Florida Association of Residential Property Managers (FARPM) in 2005. He has served on the state board for property managers for 9 years.
Vice-Presdient for the Southwest Florida Apartment Association in 2003 and involved in some capacity since 1994 until 2004. He served as Affilaite-Vice President for the Naples Area Apartment Association for 3 years.

Michael has his Real Estate License and his Broker's license. He has given numerous seminars to many groups of professionals including property managers (NARPM's 1997 National Convention and many Florida State Conventions) , real estate investors, condominium groups and the apartment industry. His areas of speaking about property management include (but not limited to) limiting your liability, business growth, leadership, property management systems and tenant selection. Michael has obtained his Residential Management Porfessional (RMP) and Master Property Manager (MPM) designation from NARPM and there are fewer than 200 MPMs in the nation.

2015 President NARPM Orlando/CFL Chapter
2018 President Florida State NARPM

about:
Bryan Jenkins MPM, RMP, SFR is the President of Genstone Property Management. Genstone is headquartered in Tampa, Florida and manages SFR and MFH assets across 12 states and multiple MSA's. They specialize in traditional scattered site SFR property management, MFH Management up to 200 units, Build to Rent management, asset management, REO Management, and assignment of rent properties throughout the US. He is also co-founder of PM Business ImpleMentors, which provides process and systems implementations and ongoing mentoring for Property Management companies across the US. Bryan began managing self-owned portfolios in 2001 and formed AHI Properties in 2004 opening the doors for some acquisitions and the managing of client homes. AHI Properties joined PURE Property Management in 2021 and during his time with them he worked on the PURE Institutional Management Team, a dedicated division launched in 2022 to service institutional investor clients and their residential portfolios across multiple locations. He obtained his AL real estate license in 2005 and his Brokers license in 2007 and his GA Brokers license in 2017. He has been a NARPM (National Association of Residential Property Managers) member since 2011 and holds both his Master Property Manager (MPM) and Residential Management Professional (RMP) designations. Bryan has previously served as the NARPM National Member Services Committee Chairperson, NARPM Southeast Regional Vice President and is a past President of the Atlanta NARPM Chapter.

Bryan is married to Cheri and they have 4 children ages 28-34 and he is a veteran of both the US Navy and the US Army.

about:
Lyle Haas started working with investors and managing property in 1983 when he was originally licensed as a real estate salesperson. In 2006, Colorado Realty and Property Management, Inc. was created in response to the changing and evolving real estate market and the need for specialists in the property management field.

He is a member of the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM) and is recognized as a leader in the property management industry. Lyle served as an Assistant, South West Regional Vice President for two years in 2013 and 2014 and also served as past President of the Denver Chapter of NARPM for two consecutive terms, in 2011 and 2012 and as Treasurer in 2014. He is currently the 2015 Denver Chapter Treasurer.

In 2014, Lyle achieved the prestigious MPM (Master Property Manager) designation from the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM). This designation is held by fewer than five property managers in the Denver-Boulder area and approximately 200 property managers nationwide. It is reflective of the professional commitment he has made to the Property Management industry.

The professional designation is awarded to property managers who have completed the highest levels of achievement in the field of Residential Property Management, including advanced course requirements, service to the NARPM organization, leadership in the community and the property management industry. A detailed examination of the applicant as well as letters of recommendation from clients and industry colleagues is required to complete the certification requirements.

Stephanie Michael, MPM®, RMP®, is the Principal Broker, CEO, and Co-founder of GEM Realty in Fredericksburg, Virginia. Licensed since 2012 and a Broker since 2016, Stephanie specializes in residential property management and real estate operations throughout Central Virginia.

A dedicated member of NARPM since 2012, Stephanie earned her Residential Management Professional (RMP®) designation in 2018 and achieved the prestigious Master Property Manager (MPM®) designation in 2021 — a distinction held by only a select few property managers in Virginia. She also holds the Virginia REALTORS® Property Management Certification.

Stephanie is passionate about raising industry standards through education, leadership, technology, and mentorship. She has served in leadership roles with both local and state REALTOR® and property management organizations and is committed to helping property managers build strong, service-focused businesses that create lasting impact for owners, residents, and communities.

John is a Charleston, SC, area native. He holds an Engineering degree from Clemson University where he graduated in December 1996 with Engineering Honors and Cum Laude. While attending Clemson he was a member and, ultimately, served as President of Pi Kappa Phi fraternity. He received the Universitys coveted Greek Man of the Year Award in 1996. Today, he serves as Vice President of the Housing Corporation for the Clemson Chapter.

Immediately out of college he worked for Exxon as a Sr. Environmental Engineer and Territory Manager for 3 years. In August 1998, Exxon sponsored John in the University of Memphis Executive MBA program and was their youngest student ever to be accepted into the program. John served as the University of Memphis mascot, Pouncer, for the two years he was enrolled in the program. In June 2000, John graduated with a 4.0 GPA and was recruited by IBM Corporation. John worked at IBM for almost 10 years and served in various roles including Management and as an award-winning Sales Executive.

about:
Ben Parham is the President and Managing Real Estate Broker of Integrity Realty & Management, Inc., where he oversees all brokerage operations, drives business development, and sets the strategic direction of the company. He founded the company in 2011 as a humble startup with zero clients and a vision for delivering high-integrity, results-driven service. Through his leadership, the company has grown into a respected firm managing nearly 500 residential and commercial units across two states and three metropolitan areas. In recognition of its impact and client satisfaction, Integrity Realty & Management was voted Best Property Management Company in Denver in the 2023 Best of Mile High awards, a distinction earned through public voting.

Under Ben’s direction, Integrity expanded beyond Colorado with the successful launch of offices in both Tampa and Jacksonville, Florida—broadening the company’s footprint and bringing its full-service real estate and property management solutions to a wider market.

Ben also served as the Southwest Regional Vice President for the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM) for the 2024–2025 term, where he supported and helped guide the leadership of 11 local and state NARPM chapters across Arizona, Colorado, Nevada, New Mexico, and Utah. He holds NARPM’s Residential Management Professional (RMP)  and Master Property Manager (MPM) designations, recognizing his experience, commitment to professional development, and high standards in residential property management.

A veteran of the United States Navy, Ben proudly served as a Cryptologic Technician (Technical) 2nd Class Petty Officer, earning the Joint Service Achievement Medal, two Navy Achievement Medals, and a Good Conduct Medal. As a Department of Defense civilian, he was awarded a Letter of Recognition from the Australian government for his service and support to the Defense Signals Directorate (DSD) and Australian military operations.

After his military service, Ben earned his Associate of Science degree magna cum laude from Northern Virginia Community College, followed by a Bachelor of Science in Business Administration from Columbia College. He has been a licensed real estate broker since 2000 and currently holds broker licenses in both Colorado and Florida.

Ben remains an active and respected leader in the real estate and property management industry. He served as President of the Denver Chapter of NARPM in 2018 and as Past President in both 2019 and 2023.

about:
Fred Thompson MPM

Fred Thompson started his real estate career specializing in Residential Property Management in 1988. After working for a broker he decided to go independent with RE/MAX 200 Realty in 1998 and started the RE/MAX 200 Realty Property Management Division.

Fred has a staff of four full time property managers, one full time bookkeeper and one full time assistant, he and his staff currently manage 390 single-family homes most of which are located in North East & South East Orlando.

Fred has been very active with the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM). On a national level Fred has served as a Director in 2006, Treasurer for 2007 and currently President Elect for 2008. Fred joined NARPM in 1995 as a founding member of the Orlando Chapter and has served as Membership Chair, First Vice President, President Elect, President and Past President.

Fred achieved his Residential Management Professional designation (RMP) in 1997 from the National Association of Residential Property Managers & his Master Property Managers designation (MPM) in 2006. Fred is also an approved instructor for many of the RMP & MPM course.

Fred has also attended many National and state convention since 1996 as well as several mid year / Leadership conventions for NARPM to stay abreast of current trends in the Residential Property Management arena.

about:
Cookie has over 10 years of experience in Colorado Real Estate Sales and Residential Property Management. She is the NARPM Denver Chapter President for 2015.

She is an active member of National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM), National Association of Realtors (NAR), Colorado Association of Realtors (CAR), and Denver Metro Association of Realtors (DMAR) . She currently holds the following designations: RMP (Residential Management Professional), SFR (Short Sales and Foreclosures) and REOS (Real Estate Owned Specialist), and is working on her MPM (Master Property Manager) designation.

Before entering into the world of Real Estate, Cookie worked for Jeffco Public Schools, as a Special Education Vocational Instructor. She is a proud Colorado native who knows that she is blessed to be able to live and work in this beautiful state.

In her free time, Cookie enjoys reading, baking, camping, fishing, and volunteering with Upon the Rock Christian Camp.

She and her former high-school sweetheart, Mike, have been happily married since 1985, have three talented adult children , and one happy & adorable grandson.

about:
In 1992 Sean became a full time employee as a leasing agent for Kerr Properties, Inc. He took care of all field work including showing vacant units, move in and move out property condition reports and interior surveys. During the mid 1990's he was the representative for Kerr Properties, Inc. for all court activity for eviction proceedings

Sean obtained his Property Managers license in 1998 and from that point started to learn the inner workings of the business.

In 2004 Sean became an active member of the Greater Portland chapter of NARPM (National Association of Residential Property Managers) and in 2007 began working at the National level on the Communications Committee and at that time began running Kerr Properties, Inc. with the help of his father, Tom. Around April of 2008 Tom retired and Sean officially took the reigns as the head of Kerr Properties, Inc.

At the beginning of 2008 Sean joined the local NARPM chapter board as the President Elect and in 2009 was the local NARPM chapter President and the head chair for the NARPM NW Regional conference held in Portland. Sean is currently the Vice Chair for NARPM's Professional Standards Committee.

In 2008 Sean was the 7th recipient of NARPMs RMP (Residential Management Professional) designation within the State of Oregon and in 2011 was the 2nd recipient in the State of Oregon for NARPMs prestigious MPM (Master Property Manager) designation.

about:
Mr. Michael A. McCreary, MPM, RMP, CPM, GRI, owns and operates McCreary Realty Management, Inc., an ACCREDITED MANAGEMENT ORGANIZATION (AMO) firm as designated by IREM. McCreary Realty Management, Inc., AMO, is a family owned and operated real estate management firm offering professional property management of single-family homes & single-family home homeowners associations in Marietta, Georgia, a suburb in Northwest Atlanta.

Mr. McCreary has been licensed since 1978. Throughout Mr. McCrearys over 40 year career, he has managed thousands of properties for thousands of owners.

Mr. McCreary earned the coveted CPM, (CERTIFIED PROPERTY MANAGER) designation in 1987 from IREM. He is Past President of the IREM Georgia Chapter and was awarded CPM of the Year in 1992. He has been a National Instructor for IREM since 1990.

Mr. McCreary is an active member of the Atlanta Chapter of the National Association of Property Mangers (NARPM) since 1998 and has been awarded both the Residential Management Professional (RMP) designation and the Master Property Manager (MPM) designation. Mr. McCreary was recognized as one of the VOLUNTEER OF THE YEAR 2015 recipients nationally. Mr. McCreary is has also Chaired the Education Sub-Committee & Instructor Sub-Committee of NARPM from 2013-2017. He presently serves on Professional Development Committee since 2013 and has been a National Instructor since 2014.

about:
Maria Napolitano is the Broker at Allegiant Management Group, co-founding the company in 2012. She has over 20 years of experience in the real estate industry. A proud mother of four, exemplifying leadership through her actions.

In 2006, Maria shifted her focus to property management after several successful years as a licensed real estate agent. Using her expertise to meet the unique needs of Central Florida’s real estate market.

She leads with a deep understanding of market trends and the ever-changing dynamics of the industry. Maria strongly believes in the importance of professional development and upholding ethical standards.

She holds the RMP® (Residential Management Professional®) designation from NARPM®. As well as C2EX® (REALTORS® Commitment to Excellence), and AHWD® (At Home with Diversity) certifications.

Under Maria’s leadership, Allegiant Management Group has become a top property management firm. People recognize Allegiant for its expertise in the Kissimmee and Central Florida rental markets.

Maria is a recognized leader, involved in several organizations. These include Florida REALTORS®, the Osceola County Association of REALTORS®, and the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM®).

She dedicates herself to improving real estate standards and gives back to her community through professional and charitable efforts.

about: Melissa began her career in Property Management in 2013, as a part-time front desk receptionist for a Property Management company in Missoula, MT, while also attending the University of Montana-Missoula. She became a MT Licensed Property Manager in early 2014 and has been a NARPM member on & off since then, and consistently since 2019. In 2021, she decided to step up and volunteer on the Board of the Big Sky MT Chapter. She is currently serving as the 2026 Advisory Committee Chair for Big Sky MT, as well as the 2026 Communications/Marketing Vice Chair. Melissa obtained her RMP® designation in June of 2023 and is a current candidate for the MPM® designation. In her spare time, Melissa enjoys spending quality time with her husband & loved ones and traveling to new places.

Berton Hamamoto- President and Principal Broker of Property Profiles, Inc. Berton was born and raised in Honolulu, Hawaii, first growing up in Palama, then moving to Moanalua Gardens as a young boy. He attended Moanalua Elementary and Intermediate Schools, then graduated from Farrington High School. He then went on to the University of Southern California (USC) where he graduated in 1977 from the School of Business with a degree in Marketing. After a few years of working in the hotel food and beverage departments of Sheraton and Hawaiian Regent Hotels as a restaurant manager, Berton started with a financial planning firm specializing in annuities and insurance products. From there, he got his real estate license and specialized in handling the real estate transactions for the firm. In 1985, he acquired his real estate brokers license and headed the real estate division for the financial planning company he was with at the time. In 1987, he earned the coveted designation of Certified Financial Planner (CFP), a designation only held by a few individuals in Hawaii. In 1992, Berton formed his own real estate company, Property Profiles Inc. where he is currently the Principal Broker and President. Over the many years that he has been involved in real estate sales and property management, Berton has distinguished himself as a leader in regional and nation

about:
Janette is a seasoned Licensed Real Estate Agent who specializes in Property Management. She went to school for Business Management and Accounting at Merced College and is a licensed real estate professional. Specializing in property management, she has earned designations as a Residential Management Professional (RMP) Texas Residential Leasing Specialist (TRLS0 and Texas Residential Property Manager (TRPM) through Texas Realtors.

A recognized leader in her field, Janette is a National Association of Residential Property Managers Governmental Advisory Board of Trustee until 2028.  She has served on the Board of the National Association of Property Managers for the Fort Worth/Mid-Cities Chapter. Beyond her expertise in property management, she is also a successful investor, having built and owned three national franchises. Currently, she is developing her own RV Park Resort, leveraging her deep understanding of market trends and real estate investment strategies.

Janette’s success is defined by her ability to drive operational performance, utilizing dashboards and metrics to scale efficiency. She excels in leasing activities, investor relations, and tenant management, with a proven track record in delivering high-visibility residential and commercial projects. Her core competencies include property management, investment property acquisition and consulting, project and program management, customer service, risk management, continuous process improvement, and business development.

Her professional reputation is built on credibility, trust, and exceeding expectations, fostering win-win scenarios for clients, investors, and tenants alike.

With experience spanning brokerage ownership, franchise operations, and real estate education, Paul brings a practical, real-world perspective to property management leadership. He is known for building strong operational systems, prioritizing compliance and risk management, and maintaining clear, consistent communication between owners, residents, and teams.

Paul is an active industry leader and currently serves as the 2026 Vice President of the NARPM® Nashville Chapter. He is deeply committed to education, mentorship, and elevating professional standards within the property management industry. Paul believes strong property management is built on consistency, ethics, and relationships, and he works daily to reflect those values in his business and service.

about: Cheryl R. Chase-Berkson founded Chase Pacific Property Management and Real Estate Services in 1988, 12 years after earning her California State Real Estate license and 8 years after earning her California Real Estate Broker's License. She founded the company on the concept of the "Golden Rule" which is treating others as you would want to be treated. This code of ethics and moral conduct permeates every transaction, every relationship and every situation in which Chase Pacific deals. Cheryl named the company "Chase Pacific" in honor of her father who owned Chase Flower Shop in Fresno. Cheryl holds a B.A degree from Fresno State University and an M.A. from Texas Tech University. She moved to San Diego in 1978 from Orange County and after having lived in several other states. Her interests are travel, both local and global, short term mission trips, dance, cats, gardening, and reading. She lives in Scripps Ranch where her office is centrally located in San Diego.

about:
Jennifer Ruelens is the Broker/Owner of One Focus Property Management, Central Pennsylvanias largest and most advanced property management company. With over 20 years of experience, Jen has built a company that delivers more protection, less work, and NO DRAMA for real estate investors.
Jens leadership has transformed One Focus Property Management into a trusted partner for landlords, offering unmatched expertise and cutting-edge solutions. She oversees sales, business development, and strategic growth, while personally tackling the most complex property challenges. From navigating legal gray areas to optimizing operational efficiency, Jen is relentless in her mission to maximize investor returns and eliminate headaches.

Her unwavering commitment to excellence has elevated property management standards across the region.
Jens passion for real estate extends far beyond her company. As Hold It with PM Jen, she mentors and advocates for landlords through her podcast, live events, and educational content. Her straight-shooting advice and practical strategies have earned her a reputation as a trusted leader in the property management and investment community.
When shes not working, Jen enjoys life in Williamsport, PA, with her husband and two dogs, Josie and Frankie. Youll often find her kayaking, hanging out on the river, or staying active with Pilates. These hobbies reflect her vibrant energy and love of balancequalities she brings to every aspect of her life and business.

about:
At the age of 5, Marc was hired as the chief weed-puller for Grace Property Management, the company his father founded in 1978.

Marc spent many years pulling weeds, painting walls, showing properties, and collecting rents. Today Marc is the owner and President of Grace Property Management & Real Estate.

From a platform of managing over 1,300 rental properties in Denver, Grace Management helps real estate owners buy, sell and invest; and provides tenants with safe, clean, and fair priced housing.

If you are more impressed with initials after a name Marc holds a degree in Real Estate & Finance, has taught real estate classes in over 40 states, has been named the national property manager of the year, and is the host of the popular PMbuild podcast.

about:
David has been a real estate professional in the greater Orlando area for over 30 years. Davids specialty is residential properties in Orange and Seminole Counties. Because he has been a life-long area resident of Orlando he has weathered the growth explosion in Central Florida and knows which areas and neighborhoods are the best to live and invest.

David grew up locally graduating from Lake Mary High School. He received his AA degree from Seminole Community College and spent the next couple of years attending Florida State University where he attained his Bachelor of Science in Marketing with a minor in Communications. David grew up in the real estate business. His father was a home builder for many of his early years and both mother and father were successful real estate brokers. David learned the ropes from them and eventually went to work with Real Estate Professionals as an agent and then a manager. After that David started his own company which he ran for many years before becoming an agent and then a Manager for RE/MAX. Now David has been able to consolidate his real estate sales and property management in one great place.Keller Williams!

David is married and has a son Darren and daughter Kyra. When not working he enjoys fishing, boating, exercise, Martial arts and family activities.

In addition to his real estate license (1986) and Brokers license (1988), David earned the prestigious GRI designation from the Florida Association of Realtors. He has completed certified education modules in tax-deferred exchanges, real estate law, Realtor code of ethics, real estate appraising, property management and real estate finance. David was also named a five star; Best in Client Satisfaction Real Estate agent twice in Orlando Homebuyer Maga

about: Kayla Sharp is the Senior Property Manager and Association Broker at All 3 Realtys Georgia location, a family-owned company she co-founded with her parents (hence the "All 3"). With two locations managing over 999+ properties, Kayla takes immense pride in her diverse team representing three different countries. She believes exceptional customer service drives success in property management and advocates for more human connection, urging everyone to pick up the phone and talk to people! Shes passionate about creating outstanding resident experiences and cant stand when tenants decide to move out. Outside of work, Kayla trains for triathlons and will never answer a call on a Friday as she's usually on two wheels. A NARPM member for eight years, Kayla joined the organization after being inspired (and slightly terrified) by Monica Gilroys eye-opening litigation stories, which fueled her commitment to staying educated and prepared in her field. Over the past four years, she has been a dedicated member of the NARPM Board of Directors and was named the NARPM National Volunteer of the Year in 2023. Known for her ability to throw unforgettable parties that bring people together, Kaylas mission goes beyond the eventsshes passionate about creating a sense of belonging, ensuring every NARPM member feels valued and appreciated.

about: Maily Jacobs is a licensed Associate Broker/Realtor with the state of Virginia and has been since 1997. Maily has been in the property management arena since 1989 and currently manages approximately 200 properties throughout the Coastal Virginia formerly known as The Hampton Roads. Maily is dedicated to helping other property managers who are new to the field of property management by serving on various property management boards. She currently is serving as Secretary for the local Chapter of the National Association of Residential Property Managers for 2017. She currently holds the Residential Manager Professional designation with NARPM. She is also a proud recipient of the Distinguish Property Manager's Award for 2006, 2007, 2009, 2010, 2011, 2012, 2013, 2014 and 2015. Maily is also a recipient of The Distinguished Property Manager of the Year Award for 2011 as well as, Circle of Excellent Silver Award Winner for 2005 and 2006. Maily and her staff are hard working and dedicated professionals whose goal is to make managing your home a good experience and stress-free.

about:
About Ian Joseph, Founder of Miller Laine Property Management & Entrepreneur

Clients first! is a huge part of the DNA that Ian Joseph and his Team have established at www.millerlainepm.com. This motto helps them focus on striving for the highest level of customer experience, for their clients (landlords) and customers (tenants). In fact, Ian strongly believes that in life, family and business, you must strive to give more than you receive.

You can have everything in life you want, if you help enough other people get what they want." - Zig Ziglar

As the CEO of Miller Laine Property Management, Ian and his Team offer Professional Management Services for the First Time Landlord to the Seasoned Investor! Their proven systems and hands on approach satisfy the needs of all investor types. Their target audience is clientele that appreciates hardworking and driven industry experts like their Team, who always get the job done.
Ian is the principal partner in 4 companies that are all designed to work in harmony. Youll often hear the term Total Real Estate Solutions in the office. They cover all areas of Real Estate including Property Management, Sales, Construction and Maintenance, and Investment.
Miller Laine Property Management was founded in August of 2012.

I built the division from the ground up in all areas including the accounting software, marketing material, strategy and implementation. We continue to be one of the fastest growing Property Management companies in Washington. We currently manage 600 properties including single family residential, multi-family and commercial. I am blessed to say we have a dynamic team that is determined to be the best in what we do and to create an awesome experience with all of our clients. Ian

about:
Sheila is a real estate broker and owner of Stokley Properties, Inc.. Sheila has owned and managed properties for over 20 years. In 1995, Sheila received her BS Business Administration degree from John F. Kennedy University. In 2007, she earned her California Real Estate Salesperson license and, in 2014, Sheila earned her California Real Estate Broker license. Additionally, Sheila has completed her Property Management Certification PMG as issued by the California Association of Realtors.

After a 20 year career with Chevron, and concurrently managing the familys real estate portfolio, Sheila left Chevron in 2004 to devote her full time efforts to Stokley Properties. Her primary focus is in office administration and finance, and resident and client services.

Sheila is a member in good standing with NARPM, the National Association of Residential Property Managers, where she sits on the Board of Directors for the Alameda/Contra Costa Chapters 2015-2017 as Treasurer.

about:
Adona Lowery has been a licensed Realtor since 1993. She is a member of
the San Antonio Board of Realtors, Texas Association of Realtors, and the
National Association of Realtors, and has been for all her 14 years in the real estate profession. Adonas expertise is in Property Management. She is a member of the National Association of Residential Property Managers, and earned her RMP designation in 2007 and holds the Graduate of the Real Estate Institute designation as well. She is also a member of the San Antonio Board of Realtors Property Management Committee, and in fact, she was the Chairperson for the SABOR committee in 1998. That same year, Adona was honored as the Property Manager of the Year for all of San Antonio. The nominations for this prestigious award are submitted by area Realtors and conferred by the San Antonio Board of Realtors. Consistently, in her trust is a portfolio of 150+ properties. Over the years, property owners and local Realtors have sent her numerous referrals; likewise, they praise her ethics, dedication, and professionalism.

Currently she is seeking her MPM Designation through the National Association of Residential Property Managers. She has taken a multitude of classes that contribute to her specialty in Residential Property Management. At the present, Adona sits on the State Property Management Committee; as well as, she has served as a Chair for a Grievance Committee panel. Adona is very involved in her local NARPM chapter and currently serves as Chapter President where she has increased affiliate and general membership.
Recently she has began to teach Property Management Courses at the San Antonio Board of Realtors and volunteered to participate in the NARPM National Professional Development Committee.

about:
I earned my real estate license in 1999. I spent the next 10 years focusing mainly on sales while also doing management.
In 2009, I flipped my business model and made management my main focus, with a much smaller percentage of my business handeling sales.
After jumping into management with both feet, I earned my broker's license in 2011 and opened Paragon Property Management.
My main service area is Davis, California. I also service Woodland, Dixon, Winters in Yolo County and the Lodi area in San Joaquin County.
I do full service property management as well as list homes and represent buyers. I have a special interest in investors and can offer a great deal of expertise to anyone considering becoming a landlord.
My company is small by choice and I pride myself on providing individualized and personal service to all of my clients.
I have a Bachelor of Arts degree from San Jose State University, and prior to entering the word of real estate, worked as a buyer focusing on licensed product development for mass markets.
I am the mother of 5 young adults. I am an avid reader. I enjoy fitness, my dog and animals in general, and the great outdoors tremendously.

about:
Chris Turner has been investing in real estate since 1993. He began buying and renting homes while stationed in Alaska with the US Air Force. Originally from Greenville, SC he decided to move back to South Carolina and settled in the Columbia area. He began purchasing rental properties and handled the management, maintenance and screening of tenants himself. Over the years hes learned many lessons while managing his own real estate investments. Chris applies the lessons hes learned to keep his clients from making those same mistakes.

While he was with Century 21 Bob Capes realtors he worked with homebuyers and sellers helping them navigate the sometimes complicated world of real estate. He also headed up a new commercial office development in Northeast Columbia.

Chris decided to start his own real estate company in the hopes of being better positioned to serve his clients. Beginning in 2008 we opened our doors with just 1 client who owned 4 units. Today we manage over 200 units throughout the Midlands. We believe this rapid growth is due to our personal service and attention to detail.

In the past few years he has shifted the companys focus primarily to property management. Chris has attended numerous classes and seminars regarding rental management and currently has the Residential Management Professional designation from the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM). There are very few agents with this designation in the market. The RMP designation requires online and classroom education, 100 unit years of experience managing residential real estate, letters of recommendation from current designation holders and clients and volunteer service to NARPM.

about:
With over nineteen years experience as a Realtor, Karen Williams has seen a lot of changes in Wakulla County. One thing that has not changed is her dedication to customer service. Karen believes the best customer service comes from listening to each individual client and using that information to help them accomplish their dreams. As a member of the Tallahassee Board of Realtors, she can show you every property listed by any Realtor. She specializes in residential sales in Wakulla County as well as vacant land and investment properties. Karen will walk you through the entire process of buying or selling. From beginning to end she will ensure you have a complete understanding and that your goal is achieved. Call Karen today and let her work for you.

In addition to selling real estate, Karen also does long term property management. She manages over 85 long term rentals and is an active member of the National Association of Residential Property Managers and the Tallahassee Association of Residential Property Managers. If you would like to discuss the management of your long term rental or your investment goals, please give her a call so she can help you make your investment grow.

Karen graduated from the University of Alabama with a Bachelor of Science degree in Biology and a minor in Marine Science. Upon moving to Wakulla County in 1998, she has enjoyed her passion for the outdoors. With over 73 percent of Wakulla County being natural lands, it is no wonder Karen made Wakulla her home. about:
Envy is a full-service property management company operating in multiple counties throughout northern Utah. Professional Property Management For Investors By Investors — built to serve property owners who expect more than basic management.

The company was founded by Tanya who is a third-generation real estate investor and her husband Nick. Becoming tired of the runaround they’d had with other property management companies, and knowing there was a better way to take care of their real estate investments, they opened Envy Property Management in 2016. They founded Envy with the belief that property owners deserved a management partner who truly understands the investor perspective — not just someone to collect rent and coordinate repairs. With the mindset of being investors, they focus on utilizing technology and systems to create efficiencies and value while striving to build lasting relationships with both the investors they serve as well as the hundreds of tenants they place. Communication is a core value at Envy, ensuring owners stay informed, confident, and supported at every stage of management.

Tanya and Nick have been personally investing in real estate for over 15 years, specializing in single-family homes, multi-family apartments, and small commercial buildings. Tanya is the Director of Operations overseeing all of Envy’s day to day activities, while Nick is a licensed Principal Broker. Their long-term experience as real estate investors allows Envy to approach management decisions with both financial performance and tenant quality in mind. When not serving their clients and overseeing their investments, you can find them enjoying mountain biking, boating, snow skiing, and spending time with their 4 kids and son-in-laws.

Drawing from his own experiences, he sought a property management franchise that would provide him with a wealth of knowledge, effective systems, and a commitment to managing properties with integrity and transparency. I found that Real Property Management was precisely what I was looking for. As an investor in my own properties and a manager of properties for others, I adopt an asset management strategy that helps owners improve their return on investment (ROI) through complete and transparent financial reporting and programs designed to keep residents happy and appreciated in their homes.

about:
James-Hawkins manages the full spectrum of Montgomery rentals, from high quality Section 8 homes to premium luxury properties and everything in between. Our service is designed to give owners a white glove, hands-off experience while maximizing long term performance and protecting your investment.

Why Owners Choose Us:

  • Fast Leasing Times with most homes leasing in 30 days or less when priced strategically

  • Tailored Communication using your preferred method so you always feel informed and supported

  • Deep Section 8 Expertise including inspections, HAP contracts, compliance, and annual recertifications

  • Premium Marketing for Luxury and Market Rate Rentals with pro photos, wide listing exposure, and high quality screening

  • Vetted, Well Trained Vendors who deliver reliable repairs at fair, transparent pricing

  • Routine Property Inspections with detailed reports to safeguard your home

  • Delinquency Oversight and Legal Coordination when needed

  • No Upfront Costs or Setup Fees so you can get started with confidence

Investor Support That Goes Further:

  • Guidance on maximizing ROI and cashflow through smart pricing and maintenance planning

  • Recommendations to reduce unnecessary expenses and preserve long term value

  • Assistance with connecting to lenders for DSCR loans, fix and flip financing, refinances, and other investor-friendly loan products

  • Support for scaling portfolios, including sourcing opportunities and long term planning

What Our Clients Say:

“James-Hawkins provides exceptional property acquisition and property management services. They are thoughtful, proactive, and communicative and their attention to detail is unparalleled.”

“Working with this team has been a game changer. They handle issues quickly and make everything stress free.”

“They truly care about the property and the people. Highest possible recommendation.”

At James-Hawkins, we treat every home with the same level of care, whether it is a luxury residence or a fully HUD supported rental. We keep your tenants happy, your investment protected, and your experience simple.

Let us help you grow with confidence. Welcome to Living Made Simple!

about:
Jean Christian Taveras

Broker | Founder — Atlis Property Management

Jean Christian Taveras is the Broker and Founder of Atlis Property Management, a South Florida property management firm specializing in the management of single-family and multifamily investment properties throughout Palm Beach County, Broward County, and Martin County. Based in Palm Beach Gardens, the company provides investor-focused property management solutions designed to maximize asset performance, improve operational efficiency, and deliver a professional resident experience.

Jean founded Atlis Property Management with the goal of bringing a more structured, technology-driven approach to residential and multifamily property management. The firm focuses on implementing modern systems, streamlined communication, and data-informed decision making to help property owners protect their investments while improving long-term portfolio performance.

Through Atlis Property Management, Jean works closely with real estate investors, landlords, and multifamily owners to oversee leasing, maintenance coordination, financial reporting, and resident relations. His management philosophy centers on proactive operations, responsive communication, and operational transparency so that owners have clear insight into the performance of their properties.

In addition to property management operations, Jean has extensive experience in residential real estate brokerage and investment strategy. As the founder and broker behind the Atlis brand, he has assisted hundreds of buyers, sellers, and investors throughout South Florida in navigating acquisitions, sales, leasing, and asset management. His work frequently involves advising investors on rental property acquisition strategy, market positioning, and long-term portfolio growth.

Jean’s operational approach emphasizes leveraging technology to create efficiencies within property management operations. Atlis Property Management integrates modern property management platforms, structured maintenance coordination systems, automated communication workflows, and data-driven leasing strategies designed to reduce vacancy periods and improve the overall resident experience.

The firm manages properties across key South Florida markets including Palm Beach Gardens, Jupiter, West Palm Beach, Broward County, and Martin County. Atlis Property Management works with a wide range of property owners, from individual investors managing their first rental property to experienced owners operating larger residential portfolios.

Jean remains actively involved in the day-to-day operations and strategic growth of the company, with a focus on building a scalable management platform that prioritizes professionalism, operational efficiency, and investor alignment.

about:
Christina has been a valued member of the Bob Firestone & Company team since 1998 and currently serves as an Associate Broker. Her expertise lies in buyer's agency, and she takes great pride in her professional achievements. Christina has earned several designations, including Accredited Buyer's Agent (ABR), Graduate Realtor Institute (GRI), Short Sale, Foreclosure & Relocation (SFR), e-Pro certification, and most recently, her Property Manager certification. Her commitment to ongoing education highlights her dedication to meeting her clients' evolving needs.

Active in the Richmond Association of Realtors (RAR), Christina previously served on the Property Management Council for the Virginia Association of Realtors. She excels in listing both new and resale homes, employing customized marketing strategies tailored to each seller's unique requirements.

A native of Chesterfield County, Christina spent her formative years there before moving to Mechanicsville after getting married. She is a dedicated mother to three young men aged 27, 22, and 20, and she recently became a proud first-time grandmother to a little girl who has captured her heart.

Christina earned a Bachelor of Science in Psychology from Virginia Tech in 1997 and pursued postgraduate studies at William and Mary. Beyond her academic pursuits, she actively engages with her community. Christina has held various roles within the PTA, including two years as President at Pole Green Elementary while her children attended the school. In her leisure time, she enjoys hiking, reading, and baking.

about:
Barron has been involved with property management for 16+ years. Instead of talking about myself and all the things I’ve done, I think it’s much more important to talk about “You" the customer. Our ultimate goal should be to focus on "You". If you choose Northeast Florida Realty Inc. as your real estate brokerage/property manager, our number one goal is to listen to what your needs are. If you are buying an investment property, We want to know what you are looking for, what’s important to you, and what type of return on investment you are looking for. All these factors help us find the "right investment property" for you. If you are selling your investment property, We would like to know what your motive or reason for selling is so that we can "fit" into your plan. We enjoy what we do, we enjoy meeting people, and we really enjoy it when we can make everything work out. Real Estate and Property Management is not just a job to us, it’s who we are, it’s what we do. We help people manage, buy and sell properties. It sounds corny we know but that’s us. We believe taking care of the day to day management duties for you will make your life less stressful, enjoyable, meaningful and profitable. So if you want more than an "agent" please call us and let’s talk about what "Your" needs.

Just in case you did want to hear about me. I am a Jacksonville native born and raised here. I’ve always worked in industries that were customer service oriented. I have been in real estate since 2005, going on 18 years now. I enjoy the "hands on" approach to the real estate business. Over the years I have sold millions of dollars of real estate and helped hundreds of people just like "You" buy, sell or manage their properties in Jacksonville and the surrounding areas. I’m looking forward to working with you.

about:
Andrew Edwards is the founder and Broker of TierOne Real Estate, LLC, and a trusted authority in real estate investment with over 30 years of hands-on experience. Since 1993, he has successfully built, owned, and operated businesses across the full spectrum of real estateincluding property management, real estate brokerage, fix-and-flip ventures, and residential development.

Andrews deep understanding of the investment landscape stems not only from advising clients but from walking the walkhe has personally built and actively manages a diversified, cash-flowing real estate portfolio that reflects decades of strategic growth.

He is a past President and board member of the Utah Chapter of the National Association of Residential Property Managers (NARPM), where he helped establish industry-leading standards in property managementexperience that directly benefits the investors he serves.

Prior to launching TierOne, Andrew earned a Bachelors degree in Business Management, served in the U.S. Air Force, and held roles as a Stockbroker and Corporate Trainer with a Fortune 100 company. This unique blend of financial acumen, discipline, and leadership informs his investor-first approach.

At TierOne, Andrew and his team specialize in protecting and growing investor assets through high-performance property management and value-driven real estate strategies. His mission is simple: to help clients build long-term wealth through real estateefficiently, transparently, and profitably.

counties: Hinds, MS, Rankin, MS, Madison, MS
about:
Damon Wofford has been actively involved in real estate since 2006.  Born and raised in Jackson, MS, Damon grew up in a family having more than 30 years experience in real estate, and has been immersed in the subject from a young age.  
Damon completed his degree in Business Management from the University of Mississippi before moving home to open his first property management company, Quality Rental Houses LLC.  Acquiring management accounts from investors all over the US and abroad, Damon grew his management business from the ground up through extensive marketing efforts and attending numerous seminars all over the country.  He not only manages properties for others, but also maintains investment properties of his own.

    In 2011, to fill a need for his clients and expand his scope of business, Damon opened a Full Service Real Estate Brokerage, Damon Wofford Realty LLC.  He and his team work hard to provide the best personalized service to Landlords, Sellers, Buyers, and Tenants in the metro Jackson area. He and his team take each challenge head on, and meet them with a timely and befitting solution. Damon Wofford personally works with each of his clients to give them the attention and expertise needed to help with their real estate needs.  

   Damon Wofford Realty LLC specializes in Residential Property Management and Sales in the following areas:  Jackson (Belhaven 39202, Fondren 39216, and Northeast 39211), Ridgeland (39157), Madison/Gluckstadt (39110) and The Brandon (39042, 39047). 
​
He and his wife, both longtime Jackson residents, live in the historic neighborhood of Belhaven, and are active with many neighborhood and community organizations. They both share the same passion for the vitality of their city, and are committed supporters of efforts to keep Jackson a great place to live.

Damon is a licensed Real Estate Broker and a member of the National Association of Realtors, Mississippi Association of Realtors, Jackson Association of Realtors, and NARPM (National Association of Residential Property Managers).  
Damon Wofford is also a Licensed Real Estate Broker in Alabama and Florida and can help represent you in your purchase and sale of properties on the coast!
Check out our Alabama and Florida Gulf Coast Brokerage Sull'Acqua Realty.

about:
Welcome to the world of Real Estate, where every transaction tells a unique story. Im Sonya Grafton, your dedicated Realtor, committed to helping you navigate the intricate journey of buying, selling, renting, or investing in properties.

My background made me who I am today. My words of wisdom usually come from my very wise grandmother who raised me in Barbados. She always had a very loving attitude, and to her family was number one.
I believe my love for family comes from there, not only my immediate family but even all the children that compliment me with the title mom. As a child, every Sunday my grandmother would gather us up and take us to a Spiritual Anglican Church. This early church experience developed a fire in me that had to be fueled.

When I came to New York city, I joined a Spiritual Baptist Church. I accepted Christ into my life here in 1998 and was baptized by water in 2001. It was not long before I realized spiritual gifts that God had provided me including charity, joy, peace, kindness, goodness, generosity, gentleness, faithfulness, modesty, and self-control. From running my own business to being part of a larger business, I recognized a call to lead.
I would like to think I used the characteristics of a leader stated in 1 Timothy 3, of being above reproach, faithful to my spouse, temperate, self-controlled, respectable, hospitable, able to teach, not given to drunkenness, not violent but gentle, not quarrelsome, and not a lover of money.
With 10 years of experience in the industry, I bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise to every client interaction. Whether youre a first-time homebuyer, seasoned investor, or looking to sell or rent your property, I am here to provide personalized guidance tailored to your needs.

My approach to R

about:
Our Purpose

At Hawk Management, Inc., our mission is to enhance the lives of both real estate investors and residents by providing exceptional property management solutions. Since 2013, we have been dedicated to delivering reliable, efficient, and customer-focused services that foster positive experiences for both property owners and tenants.

What We Do

We specialize in comprehensive property management services for a wide range of property types, including single-family homes, townhomes, condos, multi-family units, industrial properties, retail spaces, and office buildings. Our team works closely with real estate investors to streamline the management, leasing, buying, and selling of properties.

We are dedicated to providing residents with safe, clean, and well-maintained rental homes that offer both comfort and value. Whether you're a property owner in need of expert management or a renter searching for a quality home, Hawk Management ensures a seamless and stress-free experience.

Please check out our website at www.hawkmgmt.com

about:
Born and raised in Boise, Idaho, I moved to Twin Falls in 2009, where I met my now husband. Together we have 4 kids and love living in the Magic Valley!

We started managing our own rental property in 2014, and Twin Falls Property Management was born in 2019. We specialize in single family, long term rental homes in the Magic Valley. 


It's been a blessing and privilege to serve the people in my community as a property manager. In a state that doesn't require licensing or credentials to be a property manager, I fully believe it's important to find the ones that know what they're doing and that are a part of organizations, like NARPM, to stay updated on laws that affect landlords and properties. I'm also a part of our local BNI chapter, and love sharing local referrals!
